scenarios.capability: Execute validate_syntax.py script against a live Prometheus instance to confirm metric existence
scenarios.reason: Requires runtime execution of a Python script and network access to a Prometheus deployment. The skill acknowledges this as a known limitation: scripts cannot verify whether metrics exist in any specific deployment.

scenarios.capability: Confirm label cardinality is within acceptable bounds by querying a live Prometheus TSDB
scenarios.reason: Requires runtime access to a Prometheus TSDB. The skill explicitly states that semantic validation requires testing against an actual Prometheus instance.
